text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky has left an incredible mark on the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She stood fast in this competitive and unrelenting
world of racing alongside her trainer, and now...
Cast! ...Plop.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
After her dream to savor the slow, good ol' life of
retirement came true...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: She lived happily ever after. Dun-dun! ♪
choice_data_list: You can't retire just like that!
You can't retire just like that!

text_block_list.text:
Our first three years together are over. Sure,
we've reached an ending of sorts, but she has to
keep racing!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Shh! Quiet. You're gonna scare the fish.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, you came all the way here. Give in to the
moment—relax and grab a rod.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: We've worked hard for three whole years. I deserve a break today.

Sky seems pretty serious. She says "today," but I
can't help feeling she'll skip practice much longer
than that.
choice_data_list: (Time to put my plan into action!)

text_block_list.text:
After all this time together, I know exactly how to
light a fire under her.
choice_data_list: I gotta check my phone really quick.
I gotta check my phone really quick.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Go right ahead.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Mmm, this weather's perfect...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Heh. That sounded way too forced.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I see right through your little act. You think you
can lure me in with—
choice_data_list:
It says, "An undisputed champion has been
born—the Centurial Overlord!"

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Undisputed?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...No no, that's got nothing to do with me
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm over being exhausted and tired of planning
strategies.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
From here on out, fishin's gonna pay my bills.
Yessiree, that's what I'm—
choice_data_list: "The Umamusume who will dominate this year!"

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Dominate.

For a moment, Sky closes her eyes and listens to
the murmurs of the stream. Then...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyone ever told ya you're a complete nutcase,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Tryin' to bait a racer past their heyday back onto
the track...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Dominate"... Hmph... I'd love to make 'em eat
those words.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Okey dokey. Guess it's time to move out.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Geez. You're really gonna play dumb, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Come on. The fish aren't really biting over here.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Why stick around if there's nothing to catch?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking of somewhere greener, a place where
I can move my legs a bit.
choice_data_list: We'll probably reel in something huge there!
We'll probably reel in something huge there!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Now then, let's focus on our next big catch, and...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Start our strategy meeting! ♪
